# Rectangle at 45° — with angled stalls the strip doesn't reach the face
# corners, so the four corners should emit landscape island triangles.

polygon outer
(0,0)
(750,0)
(750,500)
(0,500)
----
polygon outer 4 vertices, ccw, bbox (0,0)-(750,500), area 375000

set stall-angle=45
----

generate
----
total_stalls: 560
faces: 40 (boundary: 1, interior: 39)
graph: 56 vertices, 94 edges (perimeter: 32, interior: 62)
regions: 1
